target.title: Add CodexBar limits agent skill
target.body:
Closes #1605

## Summary

Adds a self-contained Codex agent skill at `.agents/skills/codexbar-limits/` so agents can safely inspect installed CodexBar provider limits, quotas, credits, and usage from any working directory.

The skill includes:

- `SKILL.md` usage instructions
- `scripts/codexbar-limits` read-only helper
- `scripts/test_codexbar_limits.py` regression coverage

## Behavior

The helper auto-detects CodexBar installs through the normal user paths:

- `CODEXBAR_LIMITS_CODEXBAR`
- `codexbar` on `PATH`
- Homebrew cask symlink locations
- `/Applications/CodexBar.app/.../CodexBarCLI`
- `~/Applications/CodexBar.app/.../CodexBarCLI`
- Homebrew Caskroom app bundles

It exposes a stable read-only contract:

- `doctor --json`
- `providers --json`
- `usage --enabled --json`
- `usage --all --json`
- `usage --provider <provider-id> --json`
- `summary`

Default output redacts identities/secrets, redacts local home install paths in JSON, and keeps machine-readable JSON on stdout separate from diagnostics.

## Safety

The helper does not mutate CodexBar config, repair auth, enable or disable providers, or write API keys. Timeout handling terminates the upstream CodexBar process group so a hung provider/helper process does not survive after the wrapper reports `upstream_timeout`.

## Verification

```text
python3 "$HOME/.codex/skills/.system/skill-creator/scripts/quick_validate.py" "$PWD/.agents/skills/codexbar-limits"
Skill is valid!

python3 -m py_compile .agents/skills/codexbar-limits/scripts/codexbar-limits .agents/skills/codexbar-limits/scripts/test_codexbar_limits.py

python3 .agents/skills/codexbar-limits/scripts/test_codexbar_limits.py
Ran 15 tests ... OK

git --no-pager diff --check
```

Additional local proof before moving the skill into this repo:

```text
doctor --json live smoke against CodexBar 0.36.1
providers --json live smoke against CodexBar 0.36.1
forced timeout summary smoke
autoreview clean: no accepted/actionable findings reported
```
target.author: coygeek
